title: Review codebase for defects and risks
description: Perform a read-only review of the current conductor portfolio codebase. Focus on runtime defects, i18n/routing issues, build or deployment risks, accessibility/SEO problems, and missing validation. Produce findings with file and line anchors, and create follow-up beads for actionable defects if needed.
acceptance_criteria: Review covers app routing/layouts, i18n config/messages, conductor data, core components, styling, package/build configuration, and current working tree state; findings are reported with file:line anchors; any actionable follow-up work is captured in Beads.

title: Change conductor name to Vaggelis Stavropoulos everywhere
description: Update every displayed and metadata reference to the conductor's name so it consistently uses the requested name: vaggelis stavropoulos. Scope includes English and Greek conductor data, page metadata, navigation/hero/contact/media copy, image alt text, structured text in messages, and any repo-owned docs or config where the public-facing name appears. Preserve existing i18n flow and verify with a repository-wide search before closing.
acceptance_criteria: All public-facing name references use the requested name consistently; both en and el content layers are updated where applicable; repository-wide search finds no stale public-facing old-name references; npm run build passes.

title: Set up Beads workflow
description: Ensure the repository Beads workspace is usable for future sessions: verify config, install Git hook shims, confirm issue export, and document any remaining local caveats.
notes: Setup validation: bd ping ok; hooks list shows all five shims installed via core.hooksPath; export.auto/path/git-add explicit in .beads/config.yaml; federation status reaches git+https://github.com/evangstav/portfolio-website.git. Caveat: bd config validate/drift include server/federation checks that do not map cleanly to this embedded-mode git+https setup; bd dolt test is unsupported in embedded mode.
close_reason: Beads workspace configured and validated: hooks installed through core.hooksPath, JSONL export enabled and explicit, remote reachability verified, and setup caveats documented.
